final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the JK flip-flop will set the output Q to 0 when both J and K are high, which is contrary to the actual behavior specified in the design.
module jk_flip_flop (
    input J,
    input K,
    input clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (J && ~K) begin
            Q <= 1; // Set
        end else if (~J && K) begin
            Q <= 0; // Reset
        end else if (J && K) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // Toggle
        end
    end
endmodule
